_README: Copy to your PROJECT ROOT as guard.config.json (or run `node .frontend-guard/guard.mjs --init` to auto-generate). Machine-readable half of the AGENT_FRONTEND_GUIDE Profile (§0). Paths are relative to this file. JSON has no comments; keys starting with _ are docs and are ignored.
_languages: web | flutter | swiftui | generic. Omit or set 'auto' intent by deleting it — the linter auto-detects from package.json / pubspec.yaml / Package.swift.
_customRules: Extend ANY language: each rule = {id, text:'code'|'nocomment', scopeKind:'all'|'nonUi'|'nonApi'|'nonUiNonChrome', patterns:[<regex string>], message, default:'error'|'warn'|'off'}.
_rules_help: Override pack defaults. error = blocks (hook denies edit / pre-commit fails); warn = printed, non-blocking; off = disabled.
